en.instruction: Please enter your feedback in the box:
en.psutil_not_found: Error: psutil module not found. Cannot stop instances safely.
en.tool_USERINPUT_desc: Tkinter-based GUI for capturing multi-line user feedback and approval.
en.tool_USERINPUT_purpose: Facilitate seamless interaction between AI Agent and user! AI Agent should execute this command separately, not combined with other commands, to ensure feedback is not missed.

zh.instruction: 请在文本框中输入您的反馈:
zh.config_updated: 配置已更新: 聚焦间隔 = {val} 秒
zh.psutil_not_found: 错误: 未找到 psutil 模块. 无法安全停止实例.
zh.instances_stopped: 已停止 {count} 个 USERINPUT实例.
zh.tool_USERINPUT_desc: 基于 Tkinter 的 GUI, 用于捕获多行用户反馈和审批.
zh.tool_USERINPUT_purpose: 促进 AI 代理与用户之间的无缝交互! AI 代理应单独执行此命令, 不要与其他命令合并执行, 以确保反馈不被遗漏.
zh.msg_attempt_failed: 尝试 {index} 失败: {error}. 正在重试...
